Public Class ContainerServiceMachineOSProfile Implements IJsonModel(Of ContainerServiceMachineOSProfile), IPersistableModel(Of ContainerServiceMachineOSProfile)

Docs.summary: The operating system and disk used by the machine.

MemberSignature.Value: public ContainerServiceMachineOSProfile ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

public bool? IsFipsEnabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsFipsEnabled
Public Property IsFipsEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsFipsEnabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Whether to use a FIPS-enabled OS.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? IsOutboundNatDisabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsOutboundNatDisabled
Public Property IsOutboundNatDisabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsOutboundNatDisabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Whether to disable OutboundNAT in windows nodes. The default value is false. Outbound NAT can only be disabled if the cluster outboundType is NAT Gateway and the Windows agent pool does not have node public IP enabled.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceMachineLinuxProfile LinuxProfile { get; set; }
.property instance class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceMachineLinuxProfile LinuxProfile

public int? OSDiskSizeInGB { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> OSDiskSizeInGB
Public Property OSDiskSizeInGB As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.OSDiskSizeInGB : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: OS Disk Size in GB to be used to specify the disk size for every machine in the master/agent pool. If you specify 0, it will apply the default osDisk size according to the vmSize specified.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSDiskType? OSDiskType { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSDiskType> OSDiskType
Public Property OSDiskType As Nullable(Of ContainerServiceOSDiskType)
member this.OSDiskType : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSDiskType> with get, set

Docs.summary: The OS disk type to be used for machines in the agent pool. The default is 'Ephemeral' if the VM supports it and has a cache disk larger than the requested OSDiskSizeGB. Otherwise, defaults to 'Managed'. May not be changed after creation. For more information see [Ephemeral OS](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/aks/cluster-configuration#ephemeral-os).

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSSku? OSSku { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSSku> OSSku
Public Property OSSku As Nullable(Of ContainerServiceOSSku)
member this.OSSku : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSSku> with get, set

Docs.summary: Specifies the OS SKU used by the agent pool. If not specified, the default is Ubuntu if OSType=Linux or Windows2019 if OSType=Windows. And the default Windows OSSKU will be changed to Windows2022 after Windows2019 is deprecated.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSType? OSType { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSType> OSType
Public Property OSType As Nullable(Of ContainerServiceOSType)
member this.OSType : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceOSType> with get, set

Docs.summary: The operating system type. The default is Linux.
